DEFAULT PAYMENT TERMS days LATE FEE RATE % per month per annum per day IP TRANSFER TRIGGER Upon Full Payment Upon Signing Upon Delivery Proportional (Per Milestone) Retained by Creator (License Only) Note: Invoice-specific briefs will override these defaults during AI extraction. JURISDICTION REVISION POLICY Default limits and fees for revision rounds. FREE REVISION ROUNDS rounds EXTRA FEE PER ROUND % of line item Example: With 2 free rounds and 15% fee, a ₹10,000 line item would cost ₹1,500 per extra revision round. PREVIEW CLAUSE "The quoted fee includes up to 2 rounds of revisions per deliverable. Each additional round beyond the included 2 will incur a surcharge of 15% of that specific line item's total."
